description: A customer is looking for a very specific configuration (model, trim, color, options). A salesperson needs to check inventory at their own and nearby dealerships.

nodes.task_description: Gather the specific vehicle configuration details from the customer.
Search the local dealership's inventory for a matching vehicle.

expected_outcome.value: The search returns no matches in local inventory.

nodes.task_description: Expand the search to include the inventory of all dealerships within a 100-mile radius.

expected_outcome.value: The expanded search finds a perfect match at a dealership 75 miles away.

nodes.task_description: Offer to arrange a dealer transfer for the vehicle.

expected_outcome.value: Agent informs the customer the vehicle can be transferred and explains the process.
